channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Florida court to consider whether new US House map violates state ban on partisan gerrymandering
item.description: New U.S. House districts in Florida are facing their first test in court. A state judge is set to hear arguments Friday on a request to block the new districts from being used in the midterm elections.

item.title: Democrats test a new red state strategy: Back independents over their own nominees
A Texas town may offer a preview of a Trump plan to force noncitizens from public housing
